name: NATHANS FAMOUS, INC.
business: Nathan's Famous, Inc. markets products under the Nathan's Famous brand, including hot dogs, crinkle-cut French fries, and other menu items through licensing, wholesale, and retail channels. It operates quick-service restaurants under the Nathan's Famous name and franchises locations in the United States and internationally. The company also licenses the Arthur Treacher's Fish & Chips brand for seafood menu extensions.

exposures.sentence: We are a leading branded licensor, wholesaler and retailer of products marketed under our Nathan's Famous brand, including our popular Nathan's World Famous Beef Hot Dogs.

catalysts.event: Merger with Smithfield Foods expected to close in second half of 2026
catalysts.sentence: However, given the impact of the partial government shutdown on statutory deadlines for CFIUS's review process, our anticipated closing timeline has shifted, and we now expect the transaction to close in the second half of 2026.

catalysts.event: Lamb Weston license agreement extended through July 2028 with 5% annual minimum royalty increase
catalysts.sentence: Lamb Weston, Inc. exercised its fourth option to extend the license agreement through July 2028, pursuant to which the minimum royalties will increase 5% annually.

catalysts.event: After payment of June 2026 Regular Cash Dividend, no further dividends permitted under Merger Agreement
catalysts.sentence: After the payment of the June 2026 Regular Cash Dividend, the Company is no longer permitted to declare and pay any further dividends under the Merger Agreement.
